merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy was established at Karachi with Charles W. Lewis, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, coinciding with the establishment of diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 15, 1947, when the U.S. Department of State established the American Embassy at Karachi with Charles W. Lewis, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both sources agree on 1947-08-15 as the date the American Embassy was established at Karachi, coinciding with the establishment of diplomatic relations with Pakistan.
